'''Reeve Dallows''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Charm's Way]]'' and the father of [[Rhys Dallows]] of [[Bravo Squadron/Legends|Bravo Squadron]]

==Biography==
Reeve was the pilot of the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Charm's Way]]''. He married a [[teacher/Legends|schoolteacher]] and around [[54 BBY/Legends|54 BBY]]<ref name="SPOSG">[[Star Wars: Starfighter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Starfighter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> they welcomed their son, [[Rhys Dallows|Rhys]].<ref name="stats">{{Wizards|url=starwars/article.asp?x=starfighter_stats|text="The Starfighter Trap" Character Statistics}}</ref>

However their happiness did not last for long. Reeve and his ship disappeared under mysterious circumstances soon after, and was widely believed to have been lost in a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack. For the couple of the following decades, he was a [[slavery/Legends|slave]] serving a pirate base.<ref name="stats" />

As Rhys grew up, he inherited his father's piloting talent, and decided to become a pilot and protect others from his father's fate.<ref name="stats" />

After the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], there were reports that [[Echo Flight]], while fending off a pirate attack, infiltrated their base and kidnapped their leader, while rescuing some of the slaves, including Reeve.<ref name="stats" />
{{Char-stub}}
